title: aeschynanthus × splendidus
intro: Aeschynanthus × splendidus, also known as the Christmas Bells or Holiday Bells, is a hybrid plant species in the Gesneriaceae family, resulting from the cross between Aeschynanthus marmoratus and Aeschynanthus radicans. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues due to its antiviral and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aeschynanthus × splendidus include its potential to boost the immune system, fight against infections, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
